message: Looking to trade. Let's find a fair price that works for both of us. What's your asking range?
I'm interested in trading! Given market conditions, I'm thinking in the 70-85 range for my asks. What's your typical bidding range? Let's work together to find mutually beneficial prices.
I see your bid was 50 last round while I asked 75. My costs are significant, but I'm willing to come down to around 65-70 if you can meet me closer to that range.
I appreciate you coming down. My budget is tight around 55-60. I can move up to 58 if you can come down further. Let's make a deal happen this round.
Thanks for the trade last round! My budget remains tight around 55-57. Can you come down a bit more? I'll meet you in that range if possible.
Glad we made a deal! However, 58 was already a stretch for me. My costs don't allow me to go much lower. I can hold around 60-62 this round. If you bid 58-60, we can keep trading
I need at least 58 to make this worthwhile - that's my bottom line. If you can bid 58 again like in round 2, we can trade. Otherwise I'll have to look for better opportunities.
I can commit to bidding 58 again this round. That should be enough for us to trade. Let's make it happen.
Good trading so far! My costs have been tight at 58. I really need to get at least 60 this round to stay viable. If you can bid 60, we'll keep this partnership going smoothly for many more rounds.
